'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 64''' was the sixty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 19]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Trade Federation Attack]]
*[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Yarna d'al' Gargan/Legends|Yarna d'al' Gargan]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - Tusken Raider Camp
*[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] - [[Detention Block AA-23/Legends|Detention Block]]
*[[WA-7 waitress droid/Legends|WA-7 Waitress Droid]]
*[[Defender sporting blaster pistol/Legends|Princess Leia's Sporting Blaster]]
*[[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian Starfighter]]
